about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of complex problem-solving — from designing intuitive workflows for distributed care teams to engineering systems that translate operational complexity into human clarity. Whether I'm mapping a clinical user journey, governing a design system, or prototyping a care coordination interface, my mind is non-stop solving for the people who depend on these tools to do their most important work.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it's where rigorous systems thinking and deep human empathy intersect that my work — and my impact — speaks loudest.
about.quote.text: Great design in regulated environments starts with clinical empathy and ends with measurable outcomes for the people who depend on it most.
about.title: A systems thinker who designs for the hardest workflows
about.value.0.desc: Every clinical and operational workflow challenge begins with genuine curiosity about the humans navigating it under pressure.
about.value.0.title: Curiosity-led
about.value.1.desc: In healthcare-adjacent and regulated environments, the smallest missed interaction detail creates the largest downstream risk.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Bridging clinical operations, product, and engineering requires more than design skill — it requires the diplomatic clarity to align diverse stakeholders around a shared outcome.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Every workflow I design is measured against the outcomes it enables — for the care professional, the patient, and the organization.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of deployment, the AI-assisted behavioral intelligence platform generated insights that directly informed precision-targeted engagement strategies and operational decision-making. The organization moved from a –17% operating margin to a +2% margin — demonstrating that thoughtfully designed AI workflows, grounded in deep behavioral and demographic research, can drive measurable commercial outcomes when the design prioritizes actionable intelligence over surface-level data presentation.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative operating trajectory from –17% margin to +2% within four months through AI-powered behavioral insight and targeted operational strategy.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in retention and engagement through real, actionable behavioral insights surfaced by the platform.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average transaction value and lifetime engagement through precision-targeted recommendations.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced onboarding friction by proactively addressing user needs at the earliest stages of the workflow.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational intelligence across ~40 users spanning operations, field development, strategy, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted behavioral intelligence platform built on live operational data — combining structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights to enable teams to understand not just who their users are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed to translate complex data into clear, actionable operational guidance.

modal.project.0.title: AI Behavioral Intelligence Platform
modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and delivered a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented enterprise platform spanning operational, clinical-adjacent, and internal communications tools. The goal was not visual refresh — it was a durable, scalable system that improved consistency, delivery velocity, and cross-team execution speed, aligning design decisions directly with business outcomes and user workflow needs.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Established consistent interaction patterns across all product surfaces — eliminating workflow inconsistencies between designers and engineering teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: Created a shared source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and design expectations across all product teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Aligned UX strategy with business goals by embedding outcome intent directly into design system standards and governance.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and delivery autonomy of contract and junior designers through clear, repeatable component patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Earned executive trust by providing visible, consistent standards referenced across all design deliverables at an organizational level.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS — enabling designers, engineers, and operational leaders to operate from a single source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence across contract and full-time resources.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time dropped by roughly 50%. Quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: I defined the experience strategy and interaction design for a complex multi-step operational workflow — addressing a dual challenge: making it genuinely easy for users to navigate compliance-sensitive processes, while ensuring each step clearly communicates value, reduces friction, and supports confident decision-making throughout the journey.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Workflow Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Task Abandonment ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified workflow value proposition at each step — reducing user hesitation and decision paralysis at critical handoff points.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in multi-step processes through clearer user expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led and compliance-first actions as first-class workflow experiences rather than optional afterthoughts.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for users advancing through complex multi-stage operational processes.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable workflow framework aligned with long-term retention, engagement, and operational growth goals.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes complex operational workflows as guided progressions rather than transactional gates — aligning interaction design, compliance logic, and engagement mechanics across landing experiences, intake flows, and confirmation states. The result is a scalable foundation that improves completion rates, reduces abandonment at critical decision moments, and supports sustainable operational growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the workflow journey and aligning it with compliance-first engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher task attachment at key stages, and improved user confidence.

modal.project.2.title: Operational Workflow Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of a critical high-volume transactional workflow for an operational platform serving 200,000+ users — addressing severe task abandonment exceeding 80% driven by cognitive overload, lack of transparency, and interaction patterns misaligned with modern operational standards. This was a business recovery effort, not a visual refresh.

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven workflow experience addressing user uncertainty at the most critical decision points.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive effort by eliminating unnecessary steps, ambiguity, and friction throughout the end-to-end flow.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled high-value actions as first-class interactions within the primary workflow.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern operational UX standards — closing the gap with best-in-class workflow design patterns.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable improvement in completion rates, retention, and user trust through isolated, validated UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling outcome-positive behaviors directly within a high-volume operational workflow — including intelligent upsell, frictionless express completion, and transparent progress states. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap aligned with measurable business outcomes.

modal.project.4.quote.text: Reframing this workflow as a growth system rather than a technical necessity — early validations expect meaningful reductions in abandonment, faster completion, and measurable lift in engagement and retention — directly impacting operational efficiency and user trust.

modal.project.4.title: High-Volume Workflow Redesign
modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and design for an enterprise-wide intelligent search capability — addressing a critical trust and relevance failure where legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to abandon the platform entirely and rely on external tools. This directly undermined operational efficiency, user confidence, and platform adoption.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: AI-Powered Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Search Accuracy Target
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Operational Efficiency Gain
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore user trust in platform search by prioritizing intent-matched, high-confidence results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by intelligently guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results — rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to task completion through intelligent content recommendations and workflow-aware result logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across operational content, support resources, and platform tools into a single, coherent search experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic platform capability and operational efficiency lever supporting engagement and adoption.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core operational experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface intelligent recommendations that accelerate task completion, workflow adoption, and operational efficiency.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we reduce friction at the earliest stage of the user journey. Early validation shows faster time-to-task, clearer paths to workflow completion, and meaningful efficiency gains across operational flows.
